cases.name: rowchunk_layers_3_11

finding: Layer-scoped rowchunk diagnostic narrows hard rows4..7 c4: with row-aware batch-GEMV O, no-rowchunk remains red [45,11,137,137]; rowchunking only layer 3 is red [45,58,137,137], layers 3+7 red [137,109,137,137], but layers 3+7+11 are generated-token green [137]*4. Single/paired controls (11, 7+11, 3+11) remain red, so the first three full-attention producer layers together are sufficient while each tested smaller subset is not.

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: focused hard-c4 full-attention layer-scope blocker has a green selected-layer rowchunk artifact (layers 3,7,11) and red smaller-subset contrasts on GPU1/XTX; no retained throughput/scaling claim.
